V-M-077.scope: Matrix motion and microinteraction verification for feedback, transitions, reduced-motion, and pointer/scroll safety.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: Copy, download, status, alert, and route feedback is short, intentional, and non-blocking.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: Reduced-motion mode uses static or fade-only variants.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: No pointer interception, scroll hijacking, or keyboard focus disruption occurs.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Animation hides operational controls, causes motion overload, or delays user tasks.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Canvas or overlay layers intercept clicks, focus, or mobile scroll gestures.
